title: MM KobbledKarp Cobblemon
description: Altered Version of the KobbledKarp Cobblemon modpack, specifically made for the Masala Mobsters group.
body:
**NOT supported by Cobblemon or KobbledKarp.**
This is a customized, extended version of the [Cobblemon KobbledKarp](https://modrinth.com/modpack/kobbledkarp-cobblemon-server-pack) modpack, primarily created for the **Masala Mobsters** friend group, but available for anyone who prefers a more polished, QoL-focused, Cobblemon-centered experience.

This pack builds on the foundation of the official KobbledKarp modlist and expands it with UI improvements, better information tools, building/utilities mods, additional Cobblemon companion mods, and general quality-of-life features, all while keeping the core Cobblemon gameplay unchanged.

Icon by [CrazyWackyBonkerz on DeviantArt](https://www.deviantart.com/crazywackybonkerz/art/130-Gyarados-Icon-663203372)!

---

# **What This Modpack Adds / Changes**

Compared to the original Cobblemon KobbledKarp pack, this modified edition provides a smoother, more intuitive, more informative gameplay experience through the mods added below.

---

## **Interface, Navigation & Menu Improvements**

These mods enhance menus, tooltips, HUD info, and client organization:

* **Jade** – Displays block, entity, and item info at a glance
* **Notes** – Lets players create quick notes/reminders in-game
* **Controlling** – Better keybind search and filtering
* **ClientSort** – Cleaner inventory organization
* **Tooltip Scroll** – Scroll inside long tooltips
* **KeepTheResourcePack** – Prevents server resource packs from resetting
* **Continuity** – Seamless connected textures

These additions make the UI significantly clearer and easier to navigate.

---

## **Cobblemon-Related Enhancements**

A suite of small but powerful upgrades that improve Cobblemon gameplay and information flow:

* **Cobblemon Integrations** – Better mod compatibility & interactions
* **Cobblemon Move Inspector** – Easily inspect movesets
* **Cobblestats** – View IVs, EVs, abilities, and more
* **Cobblemon Rize Tweaks** – Helpful tweaks for smoother Cobblemon play
* **PokemonCommands** – Additional useful Cobblemon commands
* **MoreCobblemonTweaks** – Quality-of-life improvements for battling, breeding, etc.

These mods do *not* change Cobblemon balance, they simply make it easier to understand and manage your team.

---

## **Building / World Utility Mods**

These mods support base building, editing, and world organization in survival or SMP play:

* **Litematica** + **Malilib** – Blueprinting, planning, and construction assistance
* **Minihud** – Customizable client-side markers, overlays, and waypoints
* **Tweakeroo** – Small QoL tweaks for building precision
* **TSA Decorations** – Adds decorative props for builds
* **TropiWiki** – Additional informational context
* **Polymer** – Better handling of custom content on servers

These tools make building, exploring, and planning significantly easier.

---

## **Inventory, Searching & Storage Improvements**

* **Container Searcher** – Search through nearby storage
* **Stack-to-Nearby-Chests** – Instantly move stacks to connected storage networks
* **Reacharound** – Place blocks around corners more easily

Small additions like these significantly reduce tedious inventory management.

---

## **Performance & Stability Utilities**

While most performance improvements already existed in KobbledKarp, this modified version adds:

* **Connectivity** – Networking improvements
* **Filament** – Rendering and model performance tweaks
* **Servux** – Server/client communication optimizations

These features improve chunk syncing, stability, and visual smoothness.

---

## **Aesthetic & Visual Additions**

These are lightweight enhancements that do not change gameplay, only immersion:

* **TropiWiki** – Environmental/world info
* **Tooltip Scroll** – Better tooltip readability
* **Notes** – In-game player notes
* **Misc client visual polish** (from continuity, jade, tweak mods, etc.)

---

# **Purpose of This Pack**

This pack is designed for:

* Players on the KobbledKarp Cobblemon server
* Anyone who enjoys Cobblemon but wants more UI clarity, information tools, and building utilities
* Small SMPs seeking more comfort features without altering the core gameplay loop

---

# **Disclosure / Derivative Notice**

This is an **unofficial derivative** of the KobbledKarp Cobblemon modpack.
It is not endorsed by Cobblemon or the KobbledKarp team.
All included mods belong to their respective authors.

This pack is primarily for **private use**, but is available to anyone.
